title: AWS Marketplace: Solution Architect on Demand for AI Readiness
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
Solution Architect on Demand for AI Readiness
Info
Sold by: ATLASTICITY
Atlasticity's Solution Architect on Demand for AI Readiness focuses on enabling organizations to strategically align their AWS cloud infrastructure and enterprise architecture for AI adoption. The solution architects assess current environments, identify gaps, and design scalable, secure, and cost-effective AI-ready solutions. This includes modernizing data pipelines, integrating machine learning services, and ensuring governance and compliance—laying the groundwork for organizations to harness the full potential of artificial intelligence. First hour of consultation is complimentary; hourly rates apply after.
Request private offer
Overview
Pricing
Legal
Resources
Support
Overview
Try agent mode
Create proposal
Ask question
As organizations race to integrate artificial intelligence (AI) into their business models, the demand for scalable, secure, and AI-optimized infrastructure has never been higher. Atlasticity’s Solution Architect on Demand for AI Readiness service empowers enterprises to strategically prepare their AWS cloud and data environments for successful AI adoption and transformation.
This offering brings together Atlasticity’s deep cloud expertise, proven architectural frameworks, and AI enablement methodologies to assess current environments, identify gaps, and build foundational readiness for AI deployment. Atlasticity’s Solution Architects serve as strategic advisors and technical leads, collaborating with stakeholders to ensure infrastructure, data, and application layers are optimized for AI workloads.
Key Capabilities
AI Readiness Assessment.
Evaluate infrastructure, data, and security posture to identify AI adoption gaps.
Cloud & Data Modernization.
Design scalable, AI-optimized cloud and data architectures.
Security & Compliance Alignment.
Ensure AI workloads meet privacy, governance, and regulatory standards.
AI Platform Integration.
Enable integration with leading AI/ML tools.
Cost Optimization
Optimize infrastructure to reduce AI workload costs and improve performance.
What it Solves?
Lack of clear strategy or roadmap for AI readiness within current enterprise architecture.
Inadequate cloud infrastructure for scalable model training, inferencing, and data processing.
Data silos, unstructured datasets, and legacy ETL pipelines hindering AI adoption.
Security and compliance risks associated with sensitive AI data pipelines.
High cloud costs due to inefficient compute or storage configurations for AI workloads.
Complexity in choosing the right AI/ML tools and platforms for enterprise use.
Service Outcomes
AI-Ready Architecture Blueprint
Gap Analysis & Technical Recommendations
Modernized and Governed Data Platforms
Compliance-Ready AI Workflows
Optimized Cloud Spend for AI Projects
Accelerated AI Deployment Readiness
FAQs
What is Atlasticity’s Solution Architect on Demand for AI Readiness? It is a strategic consulting and architectural service designed to help organizations assess and prepare their cloud and data environments for successful and scalable AI adoption. It includes architecture assessments, modernization planning, security alignment, and platform integration.
Who is this service for? This service is ideal for enterprises looking to integrate AI/ML into their operations but need expert guidance on infrastructure readiness, data modernization, compliance, and scalable architecture. It is tailored for CIOs, IT leaders, enterprise architects, and AI teams.
What does "AI readiness" mean in this context? AI readiness refers to having the right cloud architecture, data systems, governance, and platforms in place to support AI workloads—such as model training, deployment, and inferencing—efficiently, securely, and cost-effectively.
Highlights
Strategic AI Readiness Assessment. Identify architectural gaps and define a clear roadmap for scalable AI adoption.
Cloud & Data Modernization. Design secure, AI-optimized cloud and data platforms aligned with best practices.
Faster, Cost-Efficient AI Enablement. Accelerate AI deployment with optimized infrastructure and reduced operational overhead.
Details
Sold by
ATLASTICITY
Categories
Assessments
Cloud Operations
Cloud Financial Management
Delivery method
Professional services
Deployed on AWS

You can now purchase comprehensive solutions tailored to use cases and industries.

Resources
Vendor resources
Atlasticity Team Capabilities Statement
Support
Vendor support
Atlasticity provides expert support throughout your AI readiness journey, from initial assessment to architecture planning and platform alignment. Our dedicated Solution Architects and AWS cloud specialists ensure smooth collaboration and knowledge
Support Features Include:
Dedicated Solution Architect – Assigned expert to lead the engagement and provide guidance.
Technical Advisory Sessions – Regular checkpoints to align on architecture, security, and platform strategy.
Documentation & Deliverables – Clear reports, diagrams, and roadmaps for easy implementation.
Post-Assessment Consultation – Optional follow-up support for implementation planning and next steps.
Multi-Cloud Expertise – Support across AWS.
Contact sales@atlasticity.com or call 612-474-1939 to discuss your solution architect on demand goals and get a tailored quote.
